pageTitle: SIWE Lab | Get Started with Web3
pageDesc: A static Sign-In with Ethereum learning identity demo for ERC-4361 message fields, nonce, expiration, and replay boundaries.
heading: SIWE Learning Identity Lab
subheading: Compose and sign an ERC-4361-style message, then inspect the local result without creating a production login session.
noWalletBody: Open this lab in a browser with an EVM wallet extension to compose and sign a SIWE message.
checkNonce: Nonce is at least 8 alphanumeric characters
checkExpiration: Expiration is still in the future
localInspectionNote: These checks inspect message fields and signature shape only. A production relying party still needs server-side nonce issuance, signature verification, replay protection, and session management.
conceptNonce: A nonce must be generated by a trusted relying party and used once so an old signature cannot be replayed later.
conceptDomain: The domain and URI bind the message to the site requesting the signature, helping wallets and users detect phishing.
conceptExpiration: Issued-at and expiration timestamps narrow the valid time window for a signed authentication message.
conceptSession: A signature is not a session. Production SIWE needs a server to verify the signature and create, rotate, and invalidate sessions.
authBoundaryBody: This static GitHub Pages demo does not issue trusted nonces, store sessions, or verify ERC-1271 contract-wallet signatures. It is a learning surface for SIWE message anatomy.
learningIdentityBody: The same pattern can later help a learner prove wallet control before receiving a badge, certificate, or verifiable credential. This project does not claim that account system yet.
errorNoWallet: No injected wallet provider was detected in this browser.
errorProviderUnavailable: The selected wallet provider is unavailable.
errorNoAccount: The wallet did not return an account.
errorNoConnection: Connect a wallet before signing a SIWE message.
errorUnauthorized: The wallet has not authorized this page.
errorRequestPending: A wallet request is already pending. Check the wallet popup.
errorInvalidMessage: The SIWE message could not be constructed from the current fields.
